extensionDescription.message: Local-first receipt export. Uses your existing retailer login. No server, no accounts, your data stays in your browser.

popupReadySubline.message: Choose a retailer and start an extraction.

historyEmptyHint.message: Open the BasketIndex popup and start an extraction.

historyConfirmDelete.message: Delete this run? This cannot be undone.

historyConfirmClearAll.message: Delete all extraction history? Active jobs are not affected.

feedbackReadyMessage.message: Choose a retailer and start an extraction.

feedbackDiscoveringMessage.message: BasketIndex is finding your available receipts.

feedbackProcessingMessage.message: BasketIndex is extracting and preparing your data.

feedbackRecoveryMessage.message: BasketIndex is retrying receipts that did not complete on the first attempt.

feedbackPausedMessage.message: Extraction is paused. Resume to continue.

feedbackSuccessHint.message: Export CSV or open History to review the run.

feedbackPartialMessage.message: Most receipts were processed, but some could not be extracted.

feedbackPartialHint.message: Open History to review the run and export what is available.

feedbackTimeoutTitle.message: Retailer page did not respond in time

feedbackTimeoutMessage.message: BasketIndex could not complete the request in time.

feedbackTimeoutHint.message: Try Start again. If the retailer page is asking you to sign in, finish that first.

feedbackAuthMessage.message: BasketIndex needs an active retailer session before it can continue.

feedbackAuthHint.message: Open the retailer page, sign in, then try again.

feedbackUnavailableMessage.message: BasketIndex could not access the retailer page or data right now.

feedbackExportMessage.message: There is no completed extraction available to export.

feedbackExportHint.message: Start an extraction first or wait for the current one to finish.

feedbackUnknownHint.message: Try again. If the problem persists, reload the extension in chrome://extensions.

footerDisclaimer.message: BasketIndex is an independent open-source project and is not affiliated with Lidl, METRO, Kaufland, or any other retailer.
